SmoothPLS 0.1.2
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • synthetic_data_00
    • comparaison_one_state_02
    • smoothPLS_ScalarFD_04
    • smoothPLS_multi_states_05
    • multivariate_smoothPLS_07
    • lim_fpls_smoothPLS_03
  • Changelog

    generate_X_df_CFD

    generate_X_df_CFD.Rd

    This function generate synthetic data of nind X(t) in state 0 or 1 by two different exponential laws.

    generate_X_df_CFD(
  nind = 500,
  start = 0,
  end = 100,
  lambda_0 = 0.2,
  lambda_1 = 0.1,
  prob_start = 0.5,
  seed = 123
)

    Arguments

    nind

    number of individuals, default 500

    start

    first time, default 0

    end

    last time, default 100

    lambda_0

    lambda parameter for exponential law for state 0, default 0.2

    lambda_1

    lambda parameter for exponential law for state 1, default 0.1

    prob_start

    Start state 1 probability, binomial law, default 0.5

    seed

    a integer, rabdom seed 123

    Value

    the dataframe of the individuals

    Author

    Francois Bassac

    Examples

    generate_X_df_CFD()
#>       id         time state
#> 1      1 0.000000e+00     0
#> 2      1 2.883051e+00     1
#> 3      1 1.617360e+01     0
#> 4      1 1.633149e+01     1
#> 5      1 1.689360e+01     0
#> 6      1 1.847610e+01     1
